title: Slice object
description: Represents a slice notation for selecting a range of elements, similar to Python's ``slice(start, stop, step)`` syntax. All properties are optional.

start.description: The starting index of the slice (inclusive). If omitted, defaults to the beginning of the sequence.

stop.description: The ending index of the slice (exclusive). If omitted, defaults to the end of the sequence.

step.description: The increment between elements. Negative values reverse the direction.
